items.title: What You Need to Know About the Foreign-Made Router Ban in the US
items.summary: The FCC banned the sale of new consumer-grade Wi-Fi routers and mobile hot spots manufactured outside the US. Here’s what it means for you.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.
